tool.name: dns_resolver
tool.description: Perform DNS record lookups and analysis for security reconnaissance.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Query specific DNS record types (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS) - Get all common record types for a domain - Perform reverse DNS lookups - Check for zone transfer vulnerabilities - Analyze SPF, DMARC, DKIM security records

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The DNS action to perform: - lookup: Query a specific record type - all_records: Get all common record types - reverse: Perform reverse DNS lookup - zone_transfer: Check for zone transfer vulnerability

parameter.name: domain
parameter.description: Target domain to query. Required for lookup, all_records, zone_transfer.

parameter.name: ip_address
parameter.description: IP address for reverse lookup. Required for reverse action.

parameter.name: record_type
parameter.description: DNS record type to query: A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT, SOA (default: A)

returns.description: DNS resolution results including records and security analysis

tool.examples:
# Lookup A records
lookup example.com A
# Get all record types
all_records example.com
# Reverse DNS lookup
reverse 8.8.8.8
# Check for zone transfer
zone_transfer example.com
